1: The LORD LORD is is the strength of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?
3: Though war should rise against me, in this will will I be be confident.
4: To behold the beauty of the LORD LORD , and to enquire in his temple.
5: In the secret of his tabernacle shall he hide me; he shall set me up upon a rock.
6: I will sing, yea, I will sing praises unto the LORD LORD .
7: Have mercy also upon me, and answer me.
8: Thy face, LORD LORD , will I seek.
9: Leave me not, neither forsake me, O God of my salvation.
10: Then the LORD LORD will take me up.
11: And lead me in a plain path, because of mine enemies.
12: For false witnesses are risen up against me, and such as breathe out cruelty.
13: Unless I had believed to see the goodness of the LORD LORD in the land of the living.
14: Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen thine heart: wait, I say, on the LORD LORD .
